news.title:
Coforge gains focus after regulatory approval for $2.5B Encora acquisition, boosting AI-led services.
Coforge approves preferential share issue at Rs 1,815.91, 48.4% above market price; YTD shares down 26%.
news.summary:
Coforge gains focus after regulatory approval for $2.5B Encora acquisition, boosting AI-led services.
Coforge approves preferential share issue at Rs 1,815.91, 48.4% above market price; YTD shares down 26%.

news.title:
Coforge secures all regulatory approvals for Encora deal at $2.5B rate.
The deal focuses on expanding AI-led engineering, data, and cloud services.
news.summary:
Coforge secures all regulatory approvals for Encora deal at $2.5B rate.

news.title:
Coforge Ltd gained 0.34%, closing at Rs.1,224.05 on 10 April 2026.
Mixed momentum included a strong midweek rally, technical shifts, and higher derivatives activity.
news.summary:
Coforge Ltd gained 0.34%, closing at Rs.1,224.05 on 10 April 2026.

news.title:
Coforge Ltd receives in-principle approval for preferential issue of 93.8M shares at INR 1,815.91 each.
This marks regulatory completion for Encora acquisition; formalities to conclude in 15 days.
news.summary:
Coforge Ltd receives in-principle approval for preferential issue of 93.8M shares at INR 1,815.91 each.
This marks regulatory completion for Encora acquisition; formalities to conclude in 15 days.

news.title:
Coforge Ltd saw a 10.3% rise in open interest, indicating strong market activity.
Despite the surge, Coforge underperformed its sector and broader indices.
news.summary:

The trade was executed at Rs. 1,235.50 per share.

news.title:
Coforge promotes Sunil Fernandes as Chief Operating Officer.
Fernandes will manage global delivery, administration, and internal IT services.

news.title:
Kotak Institutional Equities highlights TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge as top IT sector picks despite muted Q4FY26 growth and constrained FY27 visibility.
TCS shows stable margins; Infosys expects 3-5% FY27 growth; Coforge leads Q4FY26 with 19.7% YoY growth; Tech Mahindra reports flat revenue but margin gains.
news.summary:
Kotak Institutional Equities highlights TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge as top IT sector picks despite muted Q4FY26 growth and constrained FY27 visibility.
TCS shows stable margins; Infosys expects 3-5% FY27 growth; Coforge leads Q4FY26 with 19.7% YoY growth; Tech Mahindra reports flat revenue but margin gains.

news.title:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.
news.summary:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.

news.title:
Coforge gains 3% amid weak markets after announcing a strategic partnership with Solstice Innovations for AI-driven P&C insurance tech.
The partnership will leverage Coforge's Forge X AI platform, boosting investor confidence and driving significant trading volumes.
news.summary:
Coforge gains 3% amid weak markets after announcing a strategic partnership with Solstice Innovations for AI-driven P&C insurance tech.
